de.uka.ilkd.key.ui

Class AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.control.AbstractUserInterfaceControl
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.ui.AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    RuleCompletionHandler, UserInterfaceControl, ProofDisposedListener, ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener, ProblemLoaderControl, ProofEnvironmentListener, ProverTaskListener, ProgressMonitor, EventListener
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ConsoleUserInterfaceControl, WindowUserInterfaceControl

    public abstract class AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
extends AbstractUserInterfaceControl
implements RuleCompletionHandler, ProofEnvironmentListener, ProofDisposedListener
    Provides a basic implementation of UserInterfaceControl for user interfaces in which a KeYMediator is available.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.util.ProgressMonitor

        ProgressMonitor.Empty

      Returns the used KeYMediator.

      loads the problem or proof from the given file

      protected void macroFinished(ProofMacroFinishedInfo info) 
      protected void macroSideProofDisposing(ProofMacroFinishedInfo initiatingInfo, Proof initiatingProof, Proof sideProof) 
      abstract void notify(NotificationEvent event) 
      void notifyAutoModeBeingStarted()
      these methods are called immediately before automode is started to ensure that the GUI can respond in a reasonable way, e.g., change the cursor to a waiting cursor
      void notifyAutomodeStopped()
      these methods are called when automode has been stopped to ensure that the GUI can respond in a reasonable way, e.g., change the cursor to the default
      abstract void openExamples()
      called to open the build in examples
      void proofDisposed(ProofDisposedEvent e)
      When a Proof was disposed via Proof.dispose().
      void proofDisposing(ProofDisposedEvent e)
      When a Proof is going to be disposed.
      void proofRegistered(ProofEnvironmentEvent event)
      void proofUnregistered(ProofEnvironmentEvent event) 
      void registerProofAggregate(ProofAggregate pa)
      Registers an already created ProofAggregate in this UserInterfaceControl.
      private void saveSideProof(Proof proof)
      Try to save a side proof.

      void setSaveOnly(boolean s)

      • saveSideProof

        private void saveSideProof(Proof proof)
        Try to save a side proof. Saving does not rely on UI features, but failures are reported to the UI.
        Parameters:
        proof -

      • createProofEnvironmentAndRegisterProof

        public ProofEnvironment createProofEnvironmentAndRegisterProof(ProofOblInput proofOblInput,
                                                      ProofAggregate proofList,
                                                      InitConfig initConfig)
        registers the proof aggregate at the UI
        Specified by:
        createProofEnvironmentAndRegisterProof in class AbstractUserInterfaceControl
        Parameters:
        proofOblInput - the ProofOblInput
        proofList - the ProofAggregate
        initConfig - the InitConfig to be used
        Returns:
        the new ProofEnvironment where the ProofAggregate has been registered

      • notifyAutoModeBeingStarted

        public void notifyAutoModeBeingStarted()
        these methods are called immediately before automode is started to ensure that the GUI can respond in a reasonable way, e.g., change the cursor to a waiting cursor

      • notifyAutomodeStopped

        public void notifyAutomodeStopped()
        these methods are called when automode has been stopped to ensure that the GUI can respond in a reasonable way, e.g., change the cursor to the default

      • notify

        public abstract void notify(NotificationEvent event)

      • confirmTaskRemoval

        public boolean confirmTaskRemoval(String string)
        asks if removal of a task is completed. This is useful to display a dialog to the user and asking her or if on command line to allow it always.
        Parameters:
        message -
        Returns:
        true if removal has been granted
